completedPhases.title: Project Bootstrap
completedPhases.summary: Created backend npm project, installed Express/Mongoose/nanoid/dotenv/cors/nodemon, added environment files, .gitignore, and start/dev scripts.

completedPhases.title: MongoDB via Docker
completedPhases.summary: Created root docker-compose.yml for MongoDB 7 with a persistent volume and started the urlshortener-mongo container on port 27017.

completedPhases.title: Database Model
completedPhases.summary: Created backend/models/Url.js with the required Mongoose schema fields and unique indexed shortCode.

completedPhases.title: Middleware
completedPhases.summary: Created backend/middleware/adminAuth.js to protect admin routes using the x-admin-key header compared against ADMIN_API_KEY.

completedPhases.title: Controllers
completedPhases.summary: Created public and admin controllers for short URL creation, custom slugs, redirects, URL management, per-URL stats, and global stats.

verification: npm install completed with no reported vulnerabilities.
Docker container urlshortener-mongo was verified running.
Url model loaded successfully with Node.
adminAuth middleware loaded successfully with Node.
Public and admin controller modules loaded successfully with Node.
